sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 3:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 3:1
items.html: As the ten Sefirot of direct light pass in order to clothe from the screen downward, their value diminishes because of it, and they are regarded as “diminishing light.” (Part 3, 34)
